title: verific: wrong source attribute for $add cell with binary literal operand

features.name: addition with binary string literal operand
features.description: Code should include an addition operation where one operand is a binary string literal (e.g., "0001") as opposed to an integer literal
features.snippet:
logic [3:0] a, b;
assign b = a + "0001";

features.name: arithmetic operation with library-sourced operand
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic operation where the operand originates from a library or package, causing potential source attribution issues
